title: Session 30: Optimization Problems II
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview The maximum and minimum values of a function may occur at points of discontinuity, at the endpoints of the domain of the function, or at a “critical point” where the derivative of the function is zero. To determine whether a critical point is a global maximum or minimum we compare the value of the function at that point to its value at the other candidates for minima and maxima.
